steps.title: Rewrite the root as a fractional exponent
steps.content: The numerator is the square root of $16x^{4}y^{8}$. Rewrite it as an exponent: $$(16x^{4}y^{8})^{1/2}$$

steps.title: Apply the exponent to each factor
Identify the equivalent expression
steps.content: The variable part of the result is $x^{-1}y^{4}$, which matches choice D. That matches choice D — D is correct.
